IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (14886205.pdf)
SUMMARY: HR Coordinator motivated to create collaborative team environment by using background in the organization of employee training and team building events.

SOURCE: 14886205.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Manager
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: July 2014
DESCRIPTION: Diagnosed some of Cisco Systems' talent management systems to apply talent management knowledge to current HR practices. Compiled a systematic, descriptive report with suggestions for improving methods and submitted final analysis to the HR Manager.

SOURCE: 14886205.pdf
JOB TITLE: Recruiting Coordinator
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: October 2014 - Current
DESCRIPTION: Increased hiring percentage by 7% in first two months of employment. Coordinated with recruiting team, hiring managers, and candidates to schedule interviews and host onboarding orientations. Managed job openings and pursued potential candidates at career fairs.

JOB TITLE: Administrative Assistant
COMPANY: Company Name

DESCRIPTION: Administered tax records, doubled client intake by entering financial data into Quickbooks. Managed payroll accounts and resolved clients' tax problems.
